apps.name: forgejo
apps.title: Forgejo
apps.description: Self-hosted Git forge with issues, pull requests, CI/CD, and package registry.

integration.summary: Owner has to create a local Forgejo account on first use; no zone-auth auto-login yet.

apps.name: hidden-service
apps.title: Tor Hidden Service
apps.description: Tor hidden service with a simple page editor CMS.

integration.summary: Owner-only admin (gated at router); no native login, nothing to shim.

apps.name: mirotalk-p2p
apps.title: MiroTalk P2P
apps.description: Peer-to-peer video conferencing. Browsers connect directly; the server only handles signaling, never media. OpenHost zone owner is auto-logged in as host.

integration.summary: Zone-owner auto-login via signed zone_auth cookie; guests reach the zone login when they hit a gated page.

apps.name: navidrome
apps.title: Navidrome
apps.description: Modern music server and streamer compatible with Subsonic/Airsonic clients.

integration.summary: Owner creates a local Navidrome account on first use; no zone-auth auto-login yet.

apps.name: openweb-ui
apps.title: Open WebUI
apps.description: Self-hosted ChatGPT-style interface for local and remote LLMs (Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, etc).

integration.summary: Owner creates a local Open WebUI account on first use; no zone-auth auto-login yet.

apps.name: searxng
apps.title: SearXNG
apps.description: Privacy-respecting metasearch engine that aggregates results from 70+ search services.

integration.summary: Stateless public search; no native auth to shim.

apps.name: synapse
apps.title: Matrix Synapse
apps.description: Reference homeserver for the Matrix decentralized communication protocol. End-to-end encrypted messaging.

integration.summary: Owner registers a local Matrix account on first use; federated identity is Matrix-native rather than OpenHost-native.

apps.name: uptime-kuma
apps.title: Uptime Kuma
apps.description: Self-hosted uptime monitoring with HTTP, TCP, DNS, and ping checks plus status pages.

integration.summary: Owner steps through Uptime Kuma's first-run setup wizard to create a local account; no zone-auth auto-login yet.

respects_data_dirs.title: Data directories
respects_data_dirs.description: App writes all state to OPENHOST_APP_DATA_DIR and OPENHOST_APP_TEMP_DIR, not arbitrary container paths.

no_internal_tls.title: No internal TLS
no_internal_tls.description: App serves plain HTTP inside the container and lets OpenHost handle TLS.

persists_secrets.title: Secrets persist across restarts
persists_secrets.description: Auto-generated secrets are stored in app data and re-used on restart, not regenerated each boot.

zone_owner_auto_login.title: Zone-owner auto-login
zone_owner_auto_login.description: Owner's zone_auth cookie is verified at the app layer; they are not asked for a separate app-level password.

non_owner_redirect_to_zone.title: Non-owner redirect to zone login
non_owner_redirect_to_zone.description: Browsers without a valid zone_auth cookie are sent to the zone login page instead of the app's native login UI.

media_ports_in_range.title: Media ports in OpenHost range
media_ports_in_range.description: Any media or peer ports the app needs are bound to the 9000-9999 range OpenHost publishes.

oauth_broker.title: OAuth broker
oauth_broker.description: App fetches third-party OAuth tokens from /_services/secrets/oauth/token rather than asking the user to paste an API key.

cross_app_secrets.title: Cross-app secrets
cross_app_secrets.description: Secrets shared with other apps on the zone are stored in and retrieved from the secrets service.

sqlite_provisioned.title: SQLite provisioned by OpenHost
sqlite_provisioned.description: App reads its database path from OPENHOST_SQLITE_* rather than managing its own sqlite file.

federated_guest_identity.title: Federated guest identity
federated_guest_identity.description: Accepts signed identity tokens from other OpenHost zones so their owners can sign in as guests.

exposes_cross_app_service.title: Exposes a cross-app service
exposes_cross_app_service.description: Registers itself via /_services/ so other apps on the same zone can consume it.
